title: Garlic Velvet Fried Rice
description: A savory and velvety Korean dish featuring garlic clove, sauteed with quick-fix ingredients for a quick meal.

ingredients.name: Chopped garlic cloves (4-5)
ingredients.notes: Use low FODMAP brand if available

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant and golden brown, about 1 minute.
Crack eggs into the wok and scramble gently with the rice.
Pour in the light soy sauce and stir well to combine.
Stir-fry until heated through and adjust seasoning if needed.
Divide among plates and garnish with cilantro leaves if desired.
